heading: Contributions by States and political subdivisions for immediate use on authorized flood-control work; repayment
label: 701h–1 Contributions by States and political subdivisions for immediate use on authorized flood-control work; repayment
text: Whenever any State or political subdivision thereof shall offer to advance funds for a federally authorized water resources development project, the Secretary of the Army may in his discretion, receive such funds and expend the same in the immediate prosecution of such project. The Secretary of the Army is authorized and directed to repay without interest, if appropriations are provided by Congress for such purpose, the moneys so contributed and expended: , That no repayment of funds which may be contributed for the purpose of meeting any conditions of local cooperation imposed by Congress, or under the authority of , shall be made. For purposes of this section, the term “State” means the several States, the District of Columbia, the commonwealths, territories, and possessions of the United States, and Indian tribes (as defined in ).Provided, howeversection 701h of this titlesection 5304(e) of title 25
notes: Amendments2018— substituted “a federally authorized water resources development project,” for “a flood-control project duly adopted and authorized by law”, “such project” for “such work”, and “if appropriations are provided by Congress for such purpose” for “from appropriations which may be provided by Congress for flood-control work” and inserted at end “For purposes of this Act, the term ‘State’ means the several States, the District of Columbia, the commonwealths, territories, and possessions of the United States, and Indian tribes (as defined in ).”Pub. L. 115–270section 5304(e) of title 25
